rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for implementation-level contracts must be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be scoped to valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Component type contracts should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency guarantees
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are present
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not use implementation-specific paths in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
